# Mutual Accord

> [!tip] 👑 Event · Cost: **0** · Leadership

---

**Action:** Until the end of the phase, each **_Gondor_** card in play gains the **_Rohan_** trait, and each **_Rohan_** card in play gains the **_Gondor_** trait.

---

> *"These are the Rohirrim, as we name them, masters of horses... and have ever proved true to us, aiding us at need, and guarding our northern marches and the Gap of Rohan."*
> — Faramir, The Two Towers
